message:
Fix string reading for local lance files

- Reduce string buffer allocation from 1MB to 256KB max to avoid WASM
  memory exhaustion when reading strings in parallel
- Buffer size now scales with number of indices (256 bytes per string)
- Add debug WASM exports for troubleshooting string column issues
- Clean up debug logging from column type detection

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
